slides.main_text: He was fired at 34 with no savings and a family to feed.
slides.sub_text: What he did next changed everything. Swipe >>

slides.main_text: He sat in his car for 2 hours. Didn't go inside. Didn't tell his wife.
He thought of all the times he played it safe.
slides.sub_text: Was it worth the risk of being average?

slides.main_text: He decided to take a different path.
slides.sub_text: One that would either make him or break him.

slides.main_text: He faced rejection, failure, and self-doubt.
slides.sub_text: But he didn't let it define him.
And used it to create something extraordinary.
But more importantly, he found his purpose.

slides.main_text: Your setback is not your story. It's your setup.
